---
title: "Explorative Data Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
  
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stats)
library(ggplot2)
```

### Loading data
```{r}
demo <- read.csv("slides_demographics_deidentified.csv", header=TRUE, na.strings=".")
data <- read.csv("slides_data_deidentified.csv", na.strings=".")
```

## Explorative Data Anayalysis    
```{r}
#### Emotion correlations #####

# Correlation matrix for happy, sad, angry, and fairness ratings
emotions <- data %>%
  select(happy_1, sad_1, angry_1, fair_1) %>%
  na.omit()   # remove rows with missing values

emo_cor_matrix <- cor(emotions, use = "complete.obs")
print(emo_cor_matrix, digits=3)
emo_cor_melt<-emo_cor_matrix%>%
  as_tibble(rownames = "Var1")%>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Var1,
    names_to = "Var2",
    values_to = "value"
  )
ggplot(emo_cor_melt, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), color = "black", size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", high = "green",
                       midpoint = 0, limit = c(min(emo_cor_melt$value), max(emo_cor_melt$value))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Covariance Matrix Heatmap",
       x = "", y = "")
```
```{r}
## the distribution by condition
data_equal<-data%>%
  filter(condition=='Equal')
data_disadvantaged<-data%>%
  filter(condition=="Disadvantaged")
score_equal <- data_equal %>% 
  select(happy_1, sad_1, angry_1, fair_1) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~trimws(as.character(.)))) %>% 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to="variable", values_to="rating") %>% 
  filter(rating %in% c("1","2","3","4")) %>%    
  mutate(rating = factor(rating, levels=c("1","2","3","4"), ordered=TRUE)) 
ggplot(score_equal, aes(x = rating)) + 
  geom_bar(fill = "#FFCCFF") + 
  facet_wrap(~variable, ncol = 4) + 
  labs(title = "Round 1 Emotion Ratings In Equal Condition", x = "Rating (1–4)", y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)



score_disadvantaged <- data_disadvantaged %>% 
  select(happy_1, sad_1, angry_1, fair_1) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~trimws(as.character(.)))) %>% 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to="variable", values_to="rating") %>% 
  filter(rating %in% c("1","2","3","4")) %>%    
  mutate(rating = factor(rating, levels=c("1","2","3","4"), ordered=TRUE)) 
ggplot(score_disadvantaged, aes(x = rating)) + 
  geom_bar(fill = "#66CCFF") + 
  facet_wrap(~variable, ncol = 4) + 
  labs(title = "Round 1 Emotion Ratings In Disadvantage Condition", x = "Rating (1–4)", y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```


```{r}
 
vars1 <- c("happy_1","sad_1","angry_1","fair_1") 
vars1_num_condition <- data %>% 
  mutate(across(all_of(vars1), ~ { 
    x <- trimws(as.character(.)) 
    x[x %in% c("", ".", "NA")] <- NA 
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)) 
    })) %>% 
  select(PID, condition, all_of(vars1)) 
vars1_num_condition %>% 
  pivot_longer(c(happy_1, sad_1, angry_1, fair_1), 
    names_to = "emotion", 
    values_to = "score") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = condition, y = score, fill = condition)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  facet_wrap(~emotion) + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(title = "Emotion Ratings by Condition Group") 
vars1_num_color <- data %>% 
  mutate(across(all_of(vars1), ~ { 
    x <- trimws(as.character(.)) 
    x[x %in% c("", ".", "NA")] <- NA 
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)) 
    })) %>% 
  select(PID, color_choice, all_of(vars1)) 
vars1_num_color %>% 
  pivot_longer(c(happy_1, sad_1, angry_1, fair_1), 
    names_to = "emotion", 
    values_to = "score") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = color_choice, y = score, fill = color_choice)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  facet_wrap(~emotion) + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(title = "Emotion Ratings by Color Group") 
```
```{r}
## the distribution by choice color
data_green<-data%>%
  filter(color_choice =='Green')
data_orange<-data%>%
  filter(color_choice=="Orange")
score_green <- data_green %>% 
  select(happy_1, sad_1, angry_1, fair_1) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~trimws(as.character(.)))) %>% 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to="variable", values_to="rating") %>% 
  filter(rating %in% c("1","2","3","4")) %>%    
  mutate(rating = factor(rating, levels=c("1","2","3","4"), ordered=TRUE)) 
ggplot(score_green, aes(x = rating)) + 
  geom_bar(fill = "green") + 
  facet_wrap(~variable, ncol = 4) + 
  labs(title = "Round 1 Emotion Ratings with Color Green", x = "Rating (1–4)", y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)



score_orange <- data_orange %>% 
  select(happy_1, sad_1, angry_1, fair_1) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~trimws(as.character(.)))) %>% 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to="variable", values_to="rating") %>% 
  filter(rating %in% c("1","2","3","4")) %>%    
  mutate(rating = factor(rating, levels=c("1","2","3","4"), ordered=TRUE)) 
ggplot(score_orange, aes(x = rating)) + 
  geom_bar(fill = "orange") + 
  facet_wrap(~variable, ncol = 4) + 
  labs(title = "Round 1 Emotion Ratings In Disadvantage Condition", x = "Rating (1–4)", y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```




```{r}
correlation_plot<-function(data){
  emotions <- data %>%
  select(happy_1, sad_1, angry_1, fair_1) %>%
  na.omit()   # remove rows with missing values

emo_cor_matrix <- cor(emotions, use = "complete.obs")
print(emo_cor_matrix, digits=3)
emo_cor_melt<-emo_cor_matrix%>%
  as_tibble(rownames = "Var1")%>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Var1,
    names_to = "Var2",
    values_to = "value"
  )
ggplot(emo_cor_melt, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), color = "black", size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", high = "green",
                       midpoint = 0, limit = c(min(emo_cor_melt$value), max(emo_cor_melt$value))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Covariance Matrix Heatmap",
       x = "", y = "")
}
## category by board color
data%>%
  filter(color_choice=="Green")%>%
  correlation_plot()
data%>%
  filter(color_choice=="Orange")%>%
  correlation_plot()
## category by condition
data%>%
  filter(condition=="Disadvantaged")%>%
  correlation_plot()
data%>%
  filter(condition=="Equal")%>%
  correlation_plot()

## category by board color and condition
data%>%
  filter(condition=="Disadvantaged",color_choice=="Green")%>%
  correlation_plot()
data%>%
  filter(condition=="Disadvantaged",color_choice=="Orange")%>%
  correlation_plot()
data%>%
  filter(condition=="Equal",color_choice=="Green")%>%
  correlation_plot()
data%>%
  filter(condition=="Equal",color_choice=="Orange")%>%
  correlation_plot()
```


```{r}

```



```{r justice-related affect PCA}

#-------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Build PCA input, quick data checks
#-------------------------------------------------------------
jra_vars <- c("happy_1", "sad_1", "angry_1", "fair_1")

# Keep only the columns we need, drop rows with any missingness
jra_data <- data %>%
  select(all_of(jra_vars)) %>%
  na.omit()

# Descriptive check (spot miscoded scales / floor/ceiling)
summary(jra_data)
# Correlation matrix to check expected signs (happy/fair +; sad/angry -)
round(cor(jra_data), 2)


#-------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Run PCA with scaling (standardizes variables to mean 0, SD 1)
#    prcomp returns loadings in $rotation and scores in $x
#-------------------------------------------------------------
jra_pca <- prcomp(jra_data, scale. = TRUE)

# Variance explained by components
pca_summary <- summary(jra_pca)
pca_summary

# Loadings: contribution of each variable to each PC
loadings <- jra_pca$rotation
round(loadings, 3)

# Scree plot: variance explained per component (visual elbow)
plot(jra_pca, type = "l", main = "Scree Plot: JRA PCA")
```
```{r}
#-------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Build PCA input, quick data checks, divided by conditions
#-------------------------------------------------------------
jra_vars <- c("happy_1", "sad_1", "angry_1", "fair_1")

# Keep only the columns we need, drop rows with any missingness
jra_data_disadvantage <- data %>%
  filter(condition=="Disadvantaged")%>%
  select(all_of(jra_vars)) %>%
  na.omit()

jra_pca_disadvantage <- prcomp(jra_data_disadvantage, scale. = TRUE)

# Variance explained by components
pca_summary_disadvantage <- summary(jra_pca_disadvantage)
pca_summary_disadvantage

jra_vars <- c("happy_1", "sad_1", "angry_1", "fair_1")


# Keep only the columns we need, drop rows with any missingness
jra_data_equal <- data %>%
  filter(condition=="Equal")%>%
  select(all_of(jra_vars)) %>%
  na.omit()

jra_pca_equal <- prcomp(jra_data_equal, scale. = TRUE)

# Variance explained by components
pca_summary_equal <- summary(jra_pca_equal)
pca_summary_equal

```
